items.title: French peacekeeper killed in southern Lebanon
items.dek: President Macron blamed the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denied "any connection" to the incident.
items.body: President Macron blamed the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denied "any connection" to the incident.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
items.dek: The country's biggest musician Teddy Afro laments a lack of unity in the country on his new track.
items.body: The country's biggest musician Teddy Afro laments a lack of unity in the country on his new track.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: French film star Nathalie Baye dies aged 77, media report
items.dek: President Macron said France had "loved, dreamed and grown up" with the stalwart of French cinema.
items.body: President Macron said France had "loved, dreamed and grown up" with the stalwart of French cinema.
items.author: IriLine Desk
